series_metadata.series_description: List of document types in this record series include, but are not limited to: Accident or Illness form, American with Disabilities Act (ADA), C+84, C86, C-9, Childbirth/Adoption, DHO/SHO Orders, Disability Application, Doctor Letter for Light Duty, Family and Medical Leave Act (FMLA) documents, Hospitalization/Outpatient Surgery Certification, Independent Medical Exam (IME), Injury/Illness Report (ADM 4303), Medco-14s, Medical correspondence, Medical Records, Ohio Employee Assistance Program (EAP) Agreements, Retirement Disability Application, Return to Work, Salary Continuation Request/Extension, Statement of Psychiatric Disability-Psych Questionnaire (ADM 4316), Transitional Work Program (TWP), Workers' Compensation correspondence, letters from BWC, etc.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: If a paper version of a record exist, scan and record electronically ; Electronic: from effective date of employee separation. ; Microform: electronic version and
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Other
